name: sensible-ralph
description: Autonomous overnight execution of Approved Linear issues, with safety, structure, traceability, composability, and deliberation.

approved_state.title: Approved state name
approved_state.description: Linear workflow state for issues ready to dispatch. Press Enter to accept the default: Approved

in_progress_state.title: In-Progress state name
in_progress_state.description: Linear workflow state while a session is running. Press Enter to accept the default: In Progress

review_state.title: In-Review state name
review_state.description: Linear workflow state after /prepare-for-review. Press Enter to accept the default: In Review

done_state.title: Done state name
done_state.description: Linear workflow state after merge. Press Enter to accept the default: Done

failed_label.title: Failed label
failed_label.description: Label applied when a session fails or exits clean. Press Enter to accept the default: ralph-failed

stale_parent_label.title: Stale-parent label
stale_parent_label.description: Label applied to In-Review children whose parent was amended. Press Enter to accept the default: stale-parent

worktree_base.title: Worktree base directory
worktree_base.description: Directory under repo root for session worktrees. Press Enter to accept the default: .worktrees

model.title: Claude model
model.description: Model to use for dispatched sessions. Press Enter to accept the default: opus

stdout_log_filename.title: Session log filename
stdout_log_filename.description: Per-session stdout log file (inside the worktree). Press Enter to accept the default: ralph-output.log
